title: tragia dioica var. dioica
intro: Tragia dioica var. dioica, also known as the spotted spurge or dioica spurge, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its yellowish-green flowers and distinctive spotted appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tragia dioica var. dioica include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, or as a salve to apply topically to affected areas.
